case_title: ANDREW CHAN VS. WEI XIONG LIANG et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-06-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LAU, WENDY
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR CHAN, ANDREW ASSIGNED TO EVERETT LIVAHA DBA TERRIFIC JUDGMENT RECOVERY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-06-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LIANG, WEI XIONG

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAN, ANDREW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIANG, WEI XIONG LAU, WENDY $7,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,275.00, DEFENDANTS NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAN, ANDREW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIANG, WEI XIONG LAU, WENDY $7,275.00 PRINCIPAL, $7,107.75 INTEREST, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,427.75, $45.00 ENTERED UNDER COST FOR RENEWAL FEE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-01-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. NITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY ASSIGNEE EVERETT LIVAHA DBA TERRIFIC JUDGMENT RECOVERY AS TO DEFENDANT LIANG, WEI XIONG LAU, WENDY NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL FILED BY ASSIGNEE EVERETT LIVAHA DBA TERRIFIC JUDGMENT RECOVERY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,200.00 FILED BY CHAN, ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT LIANG, WEI XIONG LAU, WENDY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-23-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-23-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-01-2011 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. ATTORNEY BILL FAZIO APPEARS ON BEHALF OF THE DEFENDANTS AND REQUEST A CONTINUANCE. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $7,107.75 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT LIANG, WEI XIONG LAU, WENDY
